description: The 'Ndrina Torcasio is a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta, a Calabrian mafia organization, based in Lamezia Terme, Italy. It is allied with the Gualtieri, Cerra, and Giorgi-Pizzata clans. The clan has been involved in a long-running feud (the Faida di Lamezia Terme) with the Iannazzo-Giampà clan since 2000, resulting in dozens of murders. In 2015, a peace mediated by Reggio Calabria clans was revealed through Operation Andromeda.
